compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add proposal generation step with distinctness validation to SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Modify plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md to add a proposal generation step. This is the GREEN task — RED tests from Tasks 94f2-a222 and 4f83-d1da pass after this change.

**Implementation**:
1. Add "### Proposal Generation" section after Cross-Cutting Change Detection (end of Step 1) and before Step 2 (Arch Review)
2. Reference prompts/proposal-schema.md for the structured proposal format
3. Include distinctness validation gate: LLM instruction to self-verify proposals differ on at least one structural axis (data layer, control flow, dependency graph, interface boundary). If proposals are too similar, regenerate with explicit differentiation guidance.
4. Handle sprint vs standalone context:
   - Sprint: proposals passed to decision-maker agent for autonomous selection (agent added in Story a1f3-db49)
   - Standalone: proposals displayed to user for review/selection
   - Detection: Check if invoked from /dso:sprint context
5. Update Process Overview flowchart to include proposal generation step
6. Document configurable minimum proposal count (default 3) as prose reference
7. Remove RED markers from .test-index after tests pass GREEN

**Precondition**: Confirm RED tests fail before starting — bash tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-proposals.sh must exit non-zero.

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md (modify)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED markers)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Contract tests pass GREEN
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-proposals.sh
- [ ] Proposal Generation section exists
  Verify: grep -q "### Proposal Generation" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] 3+ proposals documented within section
  Verify: awk '/^### Proposal Generation/{found=1} found && /^### / && !/^### Proposal Generation/{exit} found{print}' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -qE "at least 3|minimum.*3"
- [ ] Schema referenced within section
  Verify: awk '/^### Proposal Generation/{found=1} found && /^### / && !/^### Proposal Generation/{exit} found{print}' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -q "proposal-schema.md"
- [ ] Distinctness axes enumerated within section
  Verify: awk '/^### Proposal Generation/{found=1} found && /^### / && !/^### Proposal Generation/{exit} found{print}' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -q "data layer\|control flow\|dependency\|interface"
- [ ] RED markers removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -q "\[test_proposal_generation" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Proposal section appears before Output Protocol
  Verify: awk '/^### Proposal Generation/{pg=NR} /^## Output Protocol/{op=NR} END{exit (pg >= op || pg == 0)}' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md

comments.author: Main

comments.author: Main
